parents.subject: LU-20096 ldlm: alloc stats before procfs

commit.subject: LU-12187 tests: skip sanity EC llapi tests in interop
commit.message:
LU-12187 tests: skip sanity EC llapi tests in interop

Skip some of the new llapi EC tests during interop when they
depend on functionality provided by the MDS and it is older.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=27D clientversion=2.17
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=27D serverversion=2.17
Fixes: 22e9e7e8b2 ("LU-12187 llapi: EC layout creation support")
Fixes: 472e0f27d4 ("LU-19545 ec: tight binding parity mirror to data mirror")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: If5956d09a10992ae48d29b38ab161b7d183ebbe5
